meta.title: Verified graduate application windows
meta.disclaimer: A window may apply to an institution, a programme group, or one programme. Every published date must be verified against an official university page and scoped explicitly.

applications.evidence: Aalto's official Computer Science master's page lists the application period as 1 December 2025 to 2 January 2026, matching the central master's admissions schedule for studies beginning in autumn 2026.
Brown CS states on its master's application page that Fall 2026 applications were accepted from 1 September 2025 until the application deadline of 23 January 2026.
CMU School of Computer Science states that Fall 2027 applications open on 9 September 2026 and that the final deadline for its general graduate programmes is 9 December 2026 at 3 p.m. Eastern time.
ETH Zurich lists 1 to 30 November 2025 as the mandatory window for applicants with an international Bachelor's degree and for ESOP or Direct Doctorate applicants.
ETH Zurich lists 1 to 30 April 2026 as a second window only for applicants with a Bachelor's degree from a Swiss university.
Fudan's official 2026 English-taught postgraduate admissions brochure states that Phase One runs from 13 October to 12 December 2025.
Fudan's official 2026 English-taught postgraduate admissions brochure states that Phase Two runs from 1 March to 31 March 2026.
Hanyang University's official 2026 Fall international graduate admission guide lists online applications from 10:00 on 4 March to 17:00 on 27 March 2026, Korea Standard Time.
